title: Hornet Removal in Old Westbury, NY | $350 - $550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Old Westbury, Long Island. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350-$550. Protecting Old Westbury estates and homes. Call today!
intro: Old Westbury's beautiful estates and tree-lined properties provide ideal nesting sites for hornets, creating serious risks for homeowners and their families. Best Pest Control NYC offers professional hornet removal services throughout Old Westbury, safely eliminating nests from your property. Our experienced technicians protect Long Island's most prestigious homes with fast, effective hornet control solutions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Old Westbury's unique properties, from historic estates to modern luxury homes. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to safely remove hornet nests while respecting your property's landscaping and architecture, ensuring your family can enjoy your grounds worry-free.
localContext: Old Westbury's expansive properties, mature oak trees, and proximity to preserved woodlands create perfect habitats for hornets, particularly around garden structures, estate outbuildings, and eaves of the area's distinguished homes. From properties near the Old Westbury Gardens to residences along Store Hill Road and Jericho Turnpike, we protect the community's elegant homes from aggressive hornet infestations.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to hornet problems in Old Westbury?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for hornet removal in Old Westbury. Given the aggressive nature of hornets and the safety of your family, we prioritize urgent calls and can typically arrive within 24 hours to assess and remove the nest from your property.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough property inspection, safe nest removal using professional-grade equipment and protective gear, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and disposal of the nest. The price varies based on nest location, size, and accessibility on your Old Westbury property.

faqs.question: Are hornets common on Old Westbury estates?
faqs.answer: Yes, Old Westbury's large properties with mature trees, gardens, and outbuildings provide ideal nesting conditions for hornets. The area's wooded landscapes and seasonal flowering plants attract hornets, especially from late spring through early fall. Regular property inspections can help detect nests early.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my landscaping and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted removal methods that protect your valuable landscaping, ornamental plants, and pets. Our technicians are trained to work safely on estate properties, and we recommend keeping pets and family members indoors during the removal process, typically 2-3 hours, for maximum safety.
